name: lunacode
description: LunaCode - a lightweight AI IDE for Railway

scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -x /opt/venv/bin/python ]; then /opt/venv/bin/python -m uvicorn backend.app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}; else python -m uvicorn backend.app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}; fi'
scripts.test: python -m compileall backend && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.railway:build: virtualenv /opt/venv && . /opt/venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
